effects_library.name: Equalize
effects_library.desc: Set target card's CRB equal to this card's CRB.

effects_library.name: CRB Change
effects_library.desc: Modify target card's CRB by amount. Negative reduces, positive buffs.

effects_library.name: Swap
effects_library.desc: Swap CRB between this card and target card.

effects_library.name: MultiHit
effects_library.desc: This card attacks X times in one turn.

effects_library.name: Force Reaction Constraint
effects_library.desc: Opponent must react using the card matching the specified constraint, or pass.

effects_library.name: INF Change
effects_library.desc: Modify target player's Influence by amount. Negative drains, positive grants.

effects_library.name: Cost Change
effects_library.desc: Modify target card's play cost by amount. Negative reduces, positive increases.

effects_library.name: Hand Swap
effects_library.desc: Swap this card with any card from the owner's hand before resolution.

effects_library.name: Loaded Choice
effects_library.desc: Target must choose one option from the choice array. Chosen effect is executed.

effects_library.name: Persist
effects_library.desc: This card remains in play instead of being discarded after combat.

effects_library.name: Return to Hand
effects_library.desc: Return this card to the owner's hand instead of discarding after combat.

effects_library.name: Survive At
effects_library.desc: This card survives destruction once, remaining in play with the specified CRB.

effects_library.name: Silence
effects_library.desc: Prevent target from using its ability.

effects_library.name: Direct Damage
effects_library.desc: Deal X damage directly to target, ignoring CRB.
